I020.title: Type and Properties of the Target Report and Target Capabilities

groups.name: DTFACT
groups.title: Basic Dataflash Active for Current Plot

values.6: Slow moving target correlated with road infrastructure (terrestrial vehicle)
values.12: Mode C code/Mode S altitude code abnormal value compared to the track
values.14: Maximum Doppler Response in Zero Filter
values.16: Duplicated or Illegal Mode S Aircraft Address
values.18: Undecodable Mode C code/Mode S altitude code
values.21: Mode 1 was present in original reply
values.22: Mode 2 was present in original reply
values.23: Plot potentially caused by Wind Turbine
values.25: Maximum number of re-interrogations reached (surveillance information)
values.26: Maximum number of re-interrogations reached (BDS Extractions)
values.29: Track Update in the Zenithal Gap
values.33: Transponder anomaly (MS XPD replies with Mode A/C to Mode A/C-only all-call)
values.36: IC Conflict detection possible - no conflict currently detected
values.37: Duplicate Mode 5 PIN (refer to the Mode 5 items in the REF)
values.65: Ambiguous acknowledge, duplicated request for same Mode S address
values.66: Ambiguous acknowledge, duplicated request for same track number
values.68: Reject, too many parallel requests (exceeds system parameter for maximum number of requests per scan)

values.0: Mode-2 code as derived from the reply of the transponder
values.1: Smoothed Mode-2 code as provided by a local tracker

values.0: Mode-1 code as derived from the reply of the transponder
values.1: Smoothed Mode-1 code as provided by a local tracker

values.0: Mode-3/A code derived from the reply of the transponder
values.1: Mode-3/A code not extracted during the last scan

values.0: No authenticated Mode 5 Data reply or Report
values.1: Authenticated Mode 5 Data reply or Report (i.e any valid Mode 5 reply type other than ID)

values.0: Mode 1 code not present or not from Mode 5 reply
Mode 2 code not present or not from Mode 5 reply
Mode 3 code not present or not from Mode 5 reply
Mode C altitude not present or not from Mode 5 reply
values.1: Mode C altitude from Mode 5 reply

items.name: RES
items.title: Resolution with which the GNSS-derived Altitude (GA) is Reported

items.name: GA
items.title: GNSS-derived Altitude of Target, Expressed as Height Above WGS 84 Ellipsoid

items.name: EM1
items.title: Subfield #5: Extended Mode 1 Code in Octal Representation

values.0: Mode-1 code derived from the reply of the transponder
values.1: Mode-1 code not extracted during the last scan

items.name: EM1
items.title: Extended Mode 1 Code in Octal Representation

items.name: TOS
items.title: Subfield #6: Time Offset for POS and GA

items.name: X5
items.title: X-pulse from Mode 5 Data Reply or Report

values.0: X-pulse set to zero or no authenticated Data reply or Report received
X-pulse set to zero or no Mode C reply
X-pulse set to zero or no Mode 3/A reply
X-pulse set to zero or no Mode 2 reply
X-pulse set to zero or no Mode 1 reply

I100.title: Mode-C Code and Code Confidence Indicator

items.name: SRR
items.title: Subfield #2: Number of Received Replies for (M)SSR

items.name: SAM
items.title: Subfield #3: Amplitude of Received Replies for (M)SSR

items.name: RPD
items.title: Subfield #6: Difference in Range Between PSR and SSR Plot

items.name: APD
items.title: Subfield #7: Difference in Azimuth Between PSR and SSR Plot

groups.name: DOU
groups.title: Signals Level of Confidence in Plot to Track Association Process

values.1: Low confidence in plot to track association
End of track lifetime (last report for this track)

groups.name: SUP
groups.title: Track Maintained with Track Information from Neighbouring Node B on the Cluster, or Network

groups.name: TCC
groups.title: Type of Plot Coordinate Transformation Mechanism

values.0: Tracking performed in so-called 'Radar Plane', i.e. neither slant range correction nor stereographical projection was applied
values.1: Slant range correction and a suitable projection technique are used to track in a 2D reference plane, tangential to the earth model at the Radar Site co-ordinates

I200.title: Calculated Track Velocity in Polar Co-ordinates

items.name: SIGX
items.title: Standard Deviation on the Horizontal Axis of the Local Grid System

items.name: SIGY
items.title: Standard Deviation on the Vertical Axis of the Local Grid System

items.name: SIGV
items.title: Standard Deviation on the Groundspeed Within the Local Grid System

items.name: SIGH
items.title: Standard Deviation on the Heading Within the Local Grid System

values.1: Comm. A and Comm. B capability
values.2: Comm. A, Comm. B and Uplink ELM
values.3: Comm. A, Comm. B, Uplink ELM and Downlink ELM

values.0: No alert, no SPI, aircraft airborne
values.1: No alert, no SPI, aircraft on ground
values.3: Alert, no SPI, aircraft on ground
values.4: Alert, SPI, aircraft airborne or on ground
values.5: No alert, SPI, aircraft airborne or on ground

items.name: MBDATA
items.title: Mode S Comm B Message Data

items.name: BDS1
items.title: Comm B Data Buffer Store 1 Address

items.name: BDS2
items.title: Comm B Data Buffer Store 2 Address

values.0: Normal Priority, surveillance function has priority
values.1: High Priority, Directed interrogation has priority over surveillance

items.name: MSPROB
items.title: Probability of Reply If Mode S UF11 or Combined Modes Are Used

items.name: BDS1
items.title: Comm B Data Buffer Store 1 Address

items.name: BDS2
items.title: Comm B Data Buffer Store 2 Address

items.name: T
items.title: Interrogation Scheduler Has Truncated the All Call Request

items.name: A
items.title: Interrogation Scheduler Has Activated the Request At Least Once

items.name: C
items.title: Interrogation Scheduler Has Activated the Request During All Its Validity

items.name: MS
items.title: Subfield #4: Mode S All Call Interrogations

values.0: No Lockout used by Interrogation Scheduler

items.title: Number of Mode S All Calls Performed for the Request
